experiment_1.Task: Predict treatment response from separate biomedical training and test TSV files in Galaxy using a tabular classification approach.
experiment_1.Prompt: I have separate training and test TSV files from a cancer study and want to know whether treatment response can be predicted from the available features in Galaxy. Please inspect the files, choose a sensible Galaxy classification approach, evaluate it on the held-out test table, and tell me which target column you used and the test ROC-AUC.
